last_fix.description: Marked 2 inverted insights as invalidated. Graduated SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2 to 20% probe. Flagged CONF_60_70 collision cluster for human review.

new_findings_this_run.detail: Evening 65% WR and afternoon 64% WR insights survived dedup pruning at conf=0.85. Fixed: marked invalidated in insights.json.
6 rules collide on 60-70% confidence range. Flagged CONF_60_70_COLLISION_AUDIT for human review.
idea_98fac4ad graduated to SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2 at gate=20%. 74% LONG bias, LONG WR=30% vs SHORT=77%.

btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1.note: 2 applications. Evidence: worst confidence bin, 40 trades. Keep active.

META_LEARNING_IDEAS_INVERSION_BUG: 4/8 ideas have inverted direction (boosting losing sessions). Fix idea generator before any idea is applied.

EVENING_BOOST_MONITORING: After restart, track treatment_wr for EVENING_session_boost. Re-escalate to 50% ONLY if treatment_wr >= 0.60 after 20 evening signals.
